---
title: "assignment8"
author: Jing Tao
format: html
---

### Step 1(a): Build NBA Database on Local PostgreSQL

Created a database named `NBAplayers` in PostgreSQL (port 5433) and populated it using `NBAPlayers.sql`.

```{r}
#| eval: false

library(shiny)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)

ui <- fluidPage(
  sliderInput("nrows", "Enter the number of rows to display:",
              min = 1, max = 519, value = 15),
  tableOutput("tbl")
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  output$tbl <- renderTable({
    conn <- dbConnect(
      RPostgres::Postgres(),
      dbname = 'NBAplayers',
      port   = 5433,
      user   = 'jingtao'
    )
    on.exit(dbDisconnect(conn), add = TRUE)
    dbGetQuery(conn, paste0(
      "SELECT * FROM player WHERE is_active = '1' LIMIT ",
      input$nrows, ";"))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```

### Step 1(b): Export to SQLite

Imported `NBAPlayers.sql` into DB Browser for SQLite and saved as `nba.db`.

### Step 1(c): Embed SQLite in Shiny

```{r}
#| eval: false

library(shiny)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)

ui <- fluidPage(
  sliderInput("nrows", "Enter the number of rows to display:",
              min = 1, max = 519, value = 15),
  dataTableOutput("tbl")
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  table <- renderDataTable({
    conn <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), dbname = 'nba.db')
    sql <- "SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, p.full_name,
            pp.urlPlayerHeadshot
            FROM player p
            INNER JOIN player_photos pp ON pp.idplayer = p.id
            WHERE p.is_active = 1"
    on.exit(dbDisconnect(conn), add = TRUE)
    table_df <- dbGetQuery(conn, paste0(sql, " LIMIT ", input$nrows, ";"))
    table_df$headshot <- paste0('<img src="', table_df$urlPlayerHeadshot, '"></img>')
    table_df[c('full_name', 'headshot')]
  }, escape = FALSE)
  output$tbl <- table
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```

### Step 1(d): Deploy on Shinyapps.io

```{r}
#| eval: false

library(rsconnect)
rsconnect::deployApp("~/Desktop/EPPS-Spring-2026/im_sp2026/nba_app")
```

### Step 2: GitHub Website Link

The deployed NBA Shiny app is available at:
[https://jingusa.shinyapps.io/nba_app/](https://jingusa.shinyapps.io/nba_app/)
